name: Torex Gold Resources Ltd.
description: Torex Gold Resources Inc. is a leading Canadian intermediate gold producer engaged in the mining, development, and exploration of its 29,000-hectare Morelos Gold Property, located in the highly prospective Guerrero Gold Belt in Mexico. As one of Mexico’s largest gold producers, the company delivers consistent operational performance and strong cash flow. Torex is committed to responsible mining practices, prioritizing environmental stewardship, social responsibility, and the creation of long-term value for shareholders through innovation and a deep commitment to the communities in which it operates.
